_comment: Tiered MCP server registry for the enterprise SDLC pipeline. Enable only what your project needs. ALL credentials come from environment variables — never inline them here. Comment out (remove) any server you don't use. See ./README.md for tiers, auth, and security guidance, and docs/07-mcp.md for the full rationale + decision matrix.

filesystem._why: Scoped file access beyond the project root when needed (monorepo siblings, shared design docs).

git._why: Structured git history/blame/diff for bug-investigator and code-reviewer without shelling out.

github._why: PRs, issues, reviews, checks. Used by release-manager, code-reviewer, product-manager. Swap for a GitLab server if you use GitLab.

postgres._why: Read-only schema introspection + query planning for database-engineer/performance-engineer. USE A READ-ONLY ROLE.

issue-tracker._why: Read/write tickets so product-manager & business-analyst work from the real backlog. This entry is Atlassian/Jira; swap args for Linear/monday as needed.

knowledge-base._why: Confluence/Notion for specs & runbooks so documentation-writer reads/writes the org KB. This entry is Confluence.

monitoring._why: Sentry/Datadog error & trace access for bug-investigator and performance-engineer during incidents.

browser._why: Playwright-driven browser for qa-engineer (E2E), frontend-engineer (visual checks), accessibility-auditor (axe scans).

openapi._why: Serve/validate the OpenAPI spec so api-reviewer and backend-engineer stay contract-first.

security-scanner._why: Semgrep MCP for on-demand SAST queries by security-reviewer (complements the vuln-scan CI gate).

docker._why: Container/image inspection for devops-engineer & infrastructure-engineer. Grants control of the Docker daemon — restrict.

kubernetes._why: Cluster introspection (read-only context recommended) for devops-engineer. NEVER point at prod with write creds from a dev session.

cloud._why: AWS/Azure/GCP resource introspection for infrastructure-engineer. Use a read-only IAM role scoped to non-prod by default. This entry is AWS.

terraform._why: Terraform registry/module/plan context for infrastructure-engineer. Plan-only; apply stays in CI with human approval.
